_comment: Harness defaults. Hooks default to Windows PowerShell (powershell.exe, .ps1) for this machine; /harness-init swaps the commands to the .sh mirror on Linux/macOS (and to 'pwsh' if you standardize on PowerShell 7). Personal overrides belong in settings.local.json (gitignored).
_security_note: We intentionally do NOT deny Edit/Write of harness.config.json, .claude/**, or specs/** here, because /harness-init, /harness-prune, and /plan legitimately write those (deny rules can't be lifted per-command). The autonomous loop instead protects its own gate config via a config-hash pin — it rolls back and stops if the config changes mid-iteration. Spec/test integrity in supervised use rests on the fresh-context /review and the guardrails in CLAUDE.md/PROMPT.md. For unattended/auto runs, additionally run inside a sandbox/container.
